Dear [First Name],

We hope this message finds you well.

As part of our ongoing efforts to ensure the security of your account, we are requesting your assistance in verifying your account details. This is a routine verification process to confirm that the information on file is accurate and up-to-date.

To proceed, please click on the link below to access a secure verification page:

[Verify Your Account Details](https://secure-bank-verification.com)

If you are unable to click the link, you may also visit our website directly by copying and pasting the following URL into your browser:

[https://secure-bank-verification.com](https://secure-bank-verification.com)

Please note that this verification is required to maintain the security of your account and to ensure that you continue to receive important updates and services.

Should you have any questions or require assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our Customer Support team at [support@bank.com](mailto:support@bank.com) or call us at 1-800-XXX-XXXX.

Thank you for your cooperation and for being a valued customer of [Bank Name].

Warm regards,  
[Bank Name] Customer Support
